optionsAndUpgrades.itemFieldId.title: Options And Upgrades Item Field Id
optionsAndUpgrades.itemFieldId.description: Internal id of the Item Record checkbox field that flags an item to display, or not, the new 'options and upgrades' section (in replacement of 'you may also like').

optionsAndUpgrades.relatedItemsTitle.title: Options And Upgrades Section Title
optionsAndUpgrades.relatedItemsTitle.description: Manually sets the title for the Options And Upgrades section on the website.

optionsAndUpgrades.relatedItemsPlacehold.title: Options And Upgrades Placeholder
optionsAndUpgrades.relatedItemsPlacehold.description: Placeholder (data-view or data-cms-area) for the Options And Upgrades section on the PDP.

optionsAndUpgrades.relatedItemsPosition.title: Options And Upgrades Position
optionsAndUpgrades.relatedItemsPosition.description: Position for the Options And Upgrades section inside the previous placeholder.

optionsAndUpgrades.addToCartText.title: Add To Cart Button Label
optionsAndUpgrades.addToCartText.description: Text to be shown as the Add To Cart button for each Option And Upgrades item.

optionsAndUpgrades.hideProductImage.title: Hide Product Image
optionsAndUpgrades.hideProductImage.description: Hides the product image for Option And Upgrades items on the website.

optionsAndUpgrades.enableRelatedItemsScr.title: Enable Option And Upgrades Scroll To Link
optionsAndUpgrades.enableRelatedItemsScr.description: Enables the scroll to link for Option And Upgrades on the website
